title: Age of Alchemy
description: Just another simple mod based around alchemy, but mostly multiplayer-oriented!
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/895ac3fb2291a72e2b5ba91054122952500b8b60.png)

Age of Alchemy is a simple, mostly multiplayer-oriented but singleplayer friendly mod based around alchemy!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17634ac795f64ffb0a71789d68f70d98055e0767.png)
To start your journey, find an alchemist ruin in a swamp. There, you will find useful info on how to do everything in the mod in the form of books!


This mod was made in 30 days for the MCreation Hub 2 September ModJam Event, using MCreator!
!!  This is a prototype submitted for the modjam! It WILL be buggy! Use with caution!  !!
